R:c. No candidate list was provided. The statements do not present a standard COGS/cost of sales line; for a property company, direct property expenses may be spread across rows such as Operating costs, Maintenance costs, and Propertytax. Selected the closest single direct-cost label, but this likely understates full direct costs and needs review.
